<section id="sec-author" class="section">
  <div class="page-header">
    <div class="page-label">Back Matter</div>
    <div class="page-title">About the Author</div>
  </div>
  <div class="author-card">
    <div class="author-avatar"><div class="ph-icon">👤</div></div>
    <div class="author-info">
      <div class="author-name">Manoj Kumar</div>
      <div class="author-title">[ Title / Position / Affiliation ]</div>
      <p>[ Author biography placeholder — 200–350 words. ]</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
